title: Acronis Design Tokens
description: DTCG-conformant token files with a small structural divergence: per-mode `values` and `platforms` live at the token level, not under `$extensions`. The public DTCG schema (declared as the file's $schema) covers the surrounding shape; this schema enforces the on-token keys plus the com.acronis.* / com.figma.* keys still inside $extensions. See ../context/spec.md.

LeafRequiresPlatforms.description: A node is a leaf if it carries `values` (per-mode) or `$value` (native DTCG: composites, dimension `{ value, unit }`, and fontWeight/fontFamily scalars). Every leaf MUST declare `platforms`.

SingleValueCarrier.description: A token carries its value through exactly one carrier: `$value` (native DTCG: composites, dimension `{ value, unit }`, and fontWeight/fontFamily scalars) or per-mode `values` (multi-mode). This enforces the mutual-exclusion half (no token may carry both); the at-least-one expectation for leaves is normative in ../context/spec.md and checked in review.

TokenType.description: Known DTCG types currently used in this package. Extend as new $types are introduced. `string` is a documented divergence — DTCG 2025.10 has no string type, but the Figma export carries raw string variables (e.g. per-state text-decoration); see ../context/spec.md.

Modes.description: Per-mode value dictionary. One or many keys. Theme modes (light/dark) live on palette; brand modes (default, deep_sky_itkontoret, …) live on semantic colors and components. Brand mode keys are lowercase with hyphens or underscores. See ../context/manifest.md.

Platforms.description: Platform scope: which consumers this token targets. See ../context/manifest.md.

AcronisTailwindRoles.description: Maps a token path segment (role/part name) to the Tailwind theme namespace the style-dictionary build routes it into. Read at build time; not part of any token's value.

AcronisTextCase.description: Figma Text Style case override, when non-default.

AcronisTextDecoration.description: Figma Text Style decoration, when present.

FigmaStyleId.description: Figma Style identifier (paint or text style). Two observed formats: S-prefixed (S:<hex>,) for text/paint styles and bare hex for some gradient styles.

FigmaScopes.description: Figma Variable scopes. Whitelist of accepted scope identifiers as emitted by Figma's Variables API.

FigmaGradientTransform.description: Figma gradient transform matrix carried for paint-style gradients where DTCG gradient has no direction field.
